types.name: Air-Core Inductor
types.description: No magnetic core; used at RF to avoid core losses.

types.name: Ferrite-Core Inductor
types.description: Ferrite core gives high inductance in small size.

types.name: Toroidal Inductor
types.description: Ring-shaped core with low magnetic leakage.

types.name: Variable Inductor
types.description: Adjustable inductance via movable core or tap.
